title: Crisp Creamy Tunisian Chicken Bake
description: A tangy and light Tunisian dish featuring chicken, rapeseed oil, and a blend of spices, perfect for a crowd-pleasing dinner. This low-carb-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together rapeseed oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together lemon juice and heavy cream.
Pour the cream mixture over the chicken and top with grated cheddar cheese.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
